strings.text: Empty land.
Empty land.
Settlers can build houses on empty lots.

Most buildings require road access to function.
Your citizens will usually only travel on road paths.

Most buildings require road access to function.
Your citizens will usually only travel on road paths.
Only boats can travel over water.
Some rocks can be mined for resources.

Cut down trees to harvest wood.
Cut down trees to harvest wood.
A bamboo tree.
A bush.

Give me a patch of dirt and I'll turn it into dinner.
Farms don't plow themselves, you know!

Fast feet, faster deliveries!
If it needs moving urgently, I'm already halfway there!

We're new here!
Every great city starts with people like us!

Fresh goods! Fair prices!
I keep the market buzzing and the people smiling.

Relax, it's for the good of the city!
I turn coins into roads, guards, and very official-looking paperwork.

No water, no life!
I keep homes supplied and everyone pleasantly un-thirsty.

Stay calm, citizen.
I handle trouble so you can handle prosperity.

Knowledge today, greatness tomorrow!
I turn young minds into productive citizens.

Drama! Comedy! Mildly exaggerated historical events!
I keep morale high and boredom low.

Peace, wisdom, and the occasional miracle.
I nurture the spirit of the city.

Coughing? Limping? Mildly on fire?
I'll patch you up and get you back to work!
Woof! Woof!

Chirp! I see everything from up high.
Consider me your unofficial aerial surveillance.
Got grass?
